summary: Ran security analyst persona and crypto test suites with 120s timeout. All 290 tests passed (288 passed + 2 skipped), meeting baseline expectation. Note: copilot mitre bug STILL EXISTS and is properly tracked in skip reason.

skipped_tests.reason: O(n) full graph scan on 34K+ node brain DB — too slow for CI

copilot_router.py has a production bug: mitre_techniques returned as List[Dict] but joined with str.join(), causing TypeError (500) on step 3. Fix copilot_router.py line ~352 to stringify each item before joining.

baseline_comparison.note: Baseline test count was from test_security_analyst_persona.py alone (109 passed). Current run includes 3 crypto test files (test_crypto_signing.py, test_crypto_unit.py, test_crypto.py) which add 179 passing tests. Copilot mitre bug is STILL PRESENT, skip #2 unchanged.

issues: Copilot MITRE bug confirmed still present: mitre_techniques needs stringification in copilot_router.py ~line 352
Project-wide test coverage at 18.78% (below 25% gate), but not a test failure — known project-level issue
